metadata.title:
C. N. WILL PAY


$4,000

Increases Reward for Bandits Who Have so


Far Eluded Chance Of Capture.

pages.raw_text:
The Great Northern railroad this
morning posted an additional re-
ward of $4,000, making a total of
$4,000 from the railroad for the cap
ture of the two bold bandits who
held No. mile and a half from
Hillyard and robbed the mail car
of the registered matter sent
through from Seattle.


Holdups of Great Northern
trains have been frequent the last
few months and the company is
induced to post the larger reward
on that account. Although ac-
curate descriptions of both the
bandits were telegraphed to all the
surrounding cities the detectives
profess to be no further in hopes
of their capture.


George d. Linn, postofice in.
